title: Chapter 15
content:
Chapter 15

Seeing the notifications, I didn’t think of anything else. Just two things were on my mind.

One, there were less than two minutes left on the clock with extension, and two, the feeling of her tight thighs was a sensation beyond anything else.

The tight, cramped pressure that I felt was beyond anything else I have ever felt from the same kind of thing. Just like the assjob, this thigh job was also out of this world.

With just a minute left on the clock, I didn’t care about prolonging my pleasure. An extended feeling was great, but the pleasure of ejaculation was amazing.

Within the confines of her tight thighs, it wasn’t long before I reached my climax even though I had just cummed a few moments ago.

My urgency was further displayed by the fact that I only had twenty seconds on the clock.

My piston movement reached new heights which also made it so that her slit was slightly parted and my dick was brushing against the insides of her lips.

“Ahhnnmm!!! Oh, my god!” Rayla kept on moaning and exclaiming as this new feeling hit her. Her legs began to buckle under the pleasure and it wasn’t long before she gushed on my cock.

At the same time, as if waiting for her to climax, my own climax hit me very hard. I began to paint the insides of her thighs and the wall underneath the kitchen counter, or something similar, with my white goo.

It didn’t stop for a few seconds, and I kept on giving large spurts until it all just stopped. No, I hadn’t stopped cumming yet. I still had a few drops of cum and a few shrills of pleasure left but I couldn’t feel it anymore all at once.

[State of completion has been lifted]

[Cooldown: 6 hours]

It wasn’t a good feeling, to say the least, stopping in the middle of it all, but there was nothing I could do about it either. I was lucky to have these five minutes and I would rather not complain by being dissatisfied with the situation because the way I saw it, as long as I had enough mana, I could keep my dick hard for an entire day.

I just needed to have enough mana for that.

“Haa…”

“Haa…”

Deep and heavy breaths. Rayla was on her knees, her head down, and her blonde hair covering her face from both sides, but I could tell she was riding off the feeling of her climax. It wasn’t immense for sure, but it was her first, so she must have felt amazing just from that small climax.

She raised her head to look at me and if I wasn’t impotent right now, my dick would have become the hardest it could have because the intoxicated look on her face was something I would never forget.

“Wha-What was that?” The puzzled look on her face indicated her confusion. I sighed and said, “Mother, that was something I just discovered. Do not fret, I will perfect this technique soon.”

Rayla just took heavy breaths in response. As much as I wanted to stay and watch, I returned to my room to clean up.

Also, I needed to get out to hunt tomorrow because there was no way I was going to win in the sewer. I needed enough power to kill the C-rank mouse, but that would be impossible with my current strength, and if it showed up again, I might not be so lucky this time.

It wasn’t long before I heard chatter from downstairs. I went down to see a bloodied Lucas, and not just him, the father, the sister, and the younger sister were injured as well.

“What happened?” I asked Rayla who was worryingly treating Lucas, who was most hurt.

“We encountered a fourth-tier bear. We got away with injuries, but the other party wasn’t so lucky.” The father spoke instead of Rayla.

He seemed to have dislocated his shoulder from the looks of it, so I went to him and said, “Hold your breath.”

He was curious about what I said, but he did so anyway. I would have told him to cough to mask the pain, but I figured it wouldn’t matter anyway, so I simply pulled his muscles into space.

A faint crackling sound was heard, and he grunted in pain, but it wasn’t anything major. I then simply massaged his dislocated point with a thin coat of mana on my fingers. The pain was soon relieved, and he stared at me with amazement as he asked, “How did you do that?”

“What?” I asked since I didn’t know what he was talking about.

“How did you do what a physician can? Have you been receiving training from a physician?” He asked, amazement still in his eyes, and not just him, but everyone was staring at me with astonishment and curiosity. Even Rayla forgot to tend to Lucas when she heard her husband’s question.

I didn’t know what it was about and also didn’t know whether he was addressing the dislocation part or the mana soothing part, so I shrugged and said, “I just tried it and it worked. I am trying many new things these days.”

“You mean to tell me you just thought of it and attempted?” the elder sister asked me.

I nodded and simply replied, “Yeah.”

I then moved to her and touched her stomach where I suspected she was most hurt, since she had been rubbing there ever since I saw her.

As expected, there was damage to her organs internally. Now internal damage needed a ‘Heal’ spell, but I didn’t have enough mana to cast it, so I decided to do what I did with the father.

I began to massage her stomach lightly while also transferring mana from me to her body. Her mana was situated in her heart, and once it sensed mine, it reacted to my mana, but mine was more dominant.

I was easily able to control the flow of mana and kept it concentrated around her stomach while I outwardly kept massaging her. Massaging wasn’t needed for internal injuries, but I needed to maintain my excuse.

It wasn’t long before her injuries began to mend themselves, but I had to use a lot of mana crystals to replenish my mana as well.

In the end, though, it worked, and her injuries had healed.

Of course, I ended up using 3000 MP for that, where I would have only needed about 800 for the heal spell.

I then moved on to the little sister who was the least injured. There were some scratches on her body, and her clothes were torn in places, showing her pink nipples.

I simply traced my fingers over her injuries, and she was soon healed fully at the expense of just 200 MP.

The rest would be taken care of with the paste Rayla was applying to Lucas.

I then moved to Lucas as well. Granted, he wasn’t on good terms with me, well, Jack, but now I was Jack, and although it sounded complicated, it really wasn’t.

I wasn’t tending to him because of indifference or any other factor, like I didn’t care, or I wasn’t the type to hold a grudge.

No. The reason to heal him was simple. To score points. Granted, there were no common senses of the other worlds where romantic feelings led to sex, but romantic feelings, regardless, existed as proven by the concept of marriage.

So, the better I am in the eyes of the ladies, the better my chances that they will let me get away with anything and everything. It would also help me when I would need them to keep my secret about my magic pole.

"What happened?" I asked as I healed Lucas, who did not have a good expression on his face.

"We faced a bear. It was tier four instead of the usual tier three. We partied up with another group, thinking it was tier three, but it wasn't, and we had to run away. Unfortunately, the other party wasn't so lucky." The elder sister replied.

I nodded as I finished healing Lucas and let Rayla apply the green magic paste on him.

"Mother," I turned to Rayla and said, "I think I should go on the hunt with them tomorrow."

"What? NO!" Rayla didn't even think before she replied.

"Think about it, mother. I can help them just like I did now. What if the injuries were graver next time? I can help them." I tried to convince her, and everyone agreed with my argument. Everyone except for Rayla appeared conflicted.

"I'll take care of him so he doesn't partake in any battles. He shall strictly be the physician of the party. You know how having someone like that makes a big difference in the forest." The father came to my help and tried to convince Rayla. After him, the rest also chimed in except for Lucas, and finally, Rayla said the magic words I had been looking forward to hearing, "Fine. You can go."
